nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
nodes.summary: 菲利普·斯克莱特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联79种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等79种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scaly-throated foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: Scaly-throated foliage-gleaner（Scaly-throated foliage-gleaner，学名 Anabacerthia variegaticeps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The scaly-throated foliage-gleaner (Anabacerthia variegaticeps), also known as the spectacled foliage-gleaner, is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Mexico, in every Central American country except Nicaragua, and in Colombia and Ecuador.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
